default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss blog migration, content strategy, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog migration to Webflow is progressing well, with launch expected early next week](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Content performance showing positive growth trends in impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=539.0)
  - [New strategies discussed to address sales objections and compete with rivals](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Plans to implement lead capture and enrichment tools to fuel sales pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Topics

### Blog Migration Progress

  - [Navigation and footer nearly complete](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
  - [18 articles per page set up, filter functionality in progress](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Launch planned without filters initially, to be added later](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=50.0)
  - [Performance test on staging showed 1.1 second load time, aiming for sub-1 second](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Table of contents based on H2s to be added for improved SEO](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Content Performance Updates

  - [125 total articles published, including 10 content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [First batch of 9 page redirects implemented](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [New article impressions growing, reaching \~10,000/week (40,000/month)](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Clicks increasing to \~30/week (120/month)](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Content refreshes outperforming new articles (25,000 impressions, 50 clicks/week)](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Continuing with festive topics (Halloween, Black Friday)](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Adding email marketing and video marketing subcategories](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Planning tool-based articles and generic content for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Incorporating sales team feedback on objection handling into content](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [Identified key rival focusing on post-click experience optimization](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Plans to analyze their keyword strategy and content topics](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1263.0)
  - [Aim to create similar content addressing specific use cases (e.g., ad traffic optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

### Lead Generation Improvements

  - [Discussed implementing Clay for lead capture and enrichment](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Plans to create targeted CTAs and lead magnets based on article topics](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Will push captured leads to HubSpot or other CRM systems](https://fathom.video/share/xuu5YyRqL8TZzNpyu7KLCQPqb2yq8b1_?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

## Next Steps
